Calculate Dry Matter Intake (DMI)

calculate_dmi.Rd

Computes daily Dry Matter Intake (kg DM/day) based on metabolic demand (GE/ED).

Usage

calculate_DMI(saveoutput = TRUE)

Arguments

saveoutput

If TRUE (default) the results are saved in the output folder.

On this page
